---
name: Spec errata
about: Report a normative defect, ambiguity, or conflict in spec/
title: "[errata] "
labels: ["errata", "spec"]
assignees: []
---

## Affected document

<!-- e.g. spec/wire-format.md §4.2 -->

## Spec version

<!-- The spec-vX.Y.Z tag or commit SHA where you observed the issue -->

## What the spec says

<!-- Quote the exact text. -->

## What's wrong

<!-- Ambiguity? Contradiction with another section? Impossible to implement?
     Diverges from what real implementations do? -->

## Suggested resolution

<!-- Optional. A concrete wording change if you have one. -->

---

**Note:** errata are acknowledged within 30 days (see OWNERSHIP.md).
Acknowledgement ≠ agreement; it confirms triage.
